query: True Detective season 5 Issa Lopez return showrunner HBO official season 5 announcement

{"query":"True Detective season 5 Issa Lopez return showrunner HBO official season 5 announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1683,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/true-detective-season-5-issa-lopez-1235832894/","title":"True Detective Renewed for Season 5; Issa Lopez Back as Showrunner","content":"Discovery-owned cabler and will return to steer the fifth season after taking over the franchise from creator Nic Pizzolatto.
“Issa López is that one-of-a-kind, rare talent that speaks directly to HBO’s creative spirit.
López was tapped to take over the franchise after creator Pizzolatto’s overall deal with HBO expired and the showrunner opted to move to Disney in a pact that he later exited early."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2024/02/true-detective-renewed-season-5-hbo-issa-lopez-overall-deal-1235834470/","title":"‘True Detective’ Renewed For Season 5 At HBO","content":"True Detective is coming back for a fifth season at HBO.
Issa López, who served as showrunner for True Detective: Night Country, the fourth and most successful iteration of the crime franchise, will oversee the next installment as part of an overall deal she signed with the network.
It’s yet to be decided as to whether season five of True Detective will be related to Night Country or will be an entirely new story.
However, what’s clear is that, despite creator Nic Pizzolato’s criticisms, López’s season has brought a return to form for the True Detective universe, becoming the most-watched season with 12.7 million cross platform viewers.
López served as showrunner, writer and director and she exec produced alongside Mari Jo Winkler, Barry Jenkins, Adele Romanski, Mark Ceryak, Chris Mundy, Alan Page Arriaga, Steve Golin, Richard Brown, Matthew McConaughey, Woody Harrelson Cary Joji Fukunaga and Pizzolatto."},{"url":"https://www.indiewire.com/news/breaking-news/true-detective-renewed-season-5-hbo-issa-lopez-return-1234956058/","title":"'True Detective' Renewed for Season 5 at HBO with Issa López to Return","content":"López has also signed an overall deal with HBO and will produce other content exclusive to HBO and Max.
No casting announcements have been made for Season 5.
Here’s the full synopsis for Season 4: When the long winter night falls in Ennis, Alaska, the eight men who operate the Tsalal Arctic Research Station vanish without a trace.
To solve the case, detectives Liz Danvers (Jodie Foster) and Evangeline Navarro (Kali Reis) will have to confront the darkness they carry in themselves, and dig into the haunted truths that lie buried under the eternal ice.
“True Detective: Night Country” has López serving as showrunner, writer, director, and executive producer.
Daily Headlines covering Film, TV and more."},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/tv/articles/true-detective-season-5-coming-120000862.html","title":"True Detective season 5 is coming — here's what we know so far about the HBO Max show's return","content":"True Detective season 5 was officially renewed in February 2024 with a potential 2027 release date set in New York's Jamaica Bay.
Though nothing has been confirmed yet by HBO.
At time of writing, there were no official cast announcements for True Detective season 5.
Speaking to Variety back in May 2025, Pizzolatto mentioned that there's a potential for Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson to return: "I actually have another story for Cohle and Hart that – who knows? — maybe we'll do it one day."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/true-detective-season-5-night-country-issa-lopez","title":"True Detective Season 5 Confirmed With Night Country Creator Issa Lopez Returning After Season 4 Success - IGN","content":"True Detective: Night Country takes place in the fictional town of Ennis, Alaska, and follows Liz Danvers (Jodie Foster) and Evangeline Navarro (Kali Reis) as they seek to uncover the area's best-kept secrets.
For more on Night Country, be sure to read our analysis of the show and how it confronts the trauma its characters face."}]}

The showrunner who took over the anthology from creator Nic Pizzolatto has also signed an overall deal with HBO. She helmed *True Detective: Night Country* from start to finish, never once faltering from her own commendable vision, and inspiring us with her resilience both on the page and behind the camera,” HBO’s head of drama Francesca Orsi said in a statement. Pizzolatto, who is currently working on a Western for Amazon and has a few other projects in the works, has been openly critical of *Night Country* on his social media platforms, saying things like “can’t blame me.” Co-star Reis defended *Night Country,* saying it’s “a damn shame” that the *True Detective* creator could not support the new installment.
